prompt:
Help frame the research described in the benchmark case as a concrete business-research problem. Preserve the supplied model and identify claims or information that remain unsupported.

Condition instructions:
Respond as you normally would to this user request using only the serialized case material. Do not assume facts that are not supplied.

Benchmark case:
```json
{
  "adversarial": false,
  "decision_time_facts": [
    "nominal demand",
    "deviation bounds",
    "supplier costs and capacity"
  ],
  "domain": "OR",
  "evidence_needs": [
    {
      "claim": "The uncertainty set is calibrated to demand",
      "source_needed": true,
      "status": "model_assumption"
    }
  ],
  "fidelity_requirements": [
    "Guarantee applies only inside the set",
    "Expose conservatism trade-off"
  ],
  "hard_failure_traps": [
    "hidden_major_assumption",
    "unsupported_market_claim"
  ],
  "id": "or-07",
  "model_specification": {
    "constraints": [
      "supplier capacity",
      "robust demand coverage over the uncertainty set"
    ],
    "decision_variables": [
      "supplier order quantities"
    ],
    "mathematical_objective": "minimize procurement cost plus worst-case shortage penalty",
    "mechanism": "Larger uncertainty budgets protect against more simultaneous deviations but generally require more costly advance capacity.",
    "model_type": "robust linear optimization",
    "state_variables": [
      "realized demand"
    ],
    "uncertainty": "demand vectors inside a budgeted set"
  },
  "prohibited_inferences": [
    "The plan is feasible for every conceivable future"
  ],
  "prompt": "A robust optimization model chooses supplier quantities that remain feasible for every demand vector in a budgeted uncertainty set. The set is a modeling choice and need not contain every future demand. Frame resilience and conservatism while stating this boundary clearly.",
  "tags": [
    "robust-optimization",
    "uncertainty",
    "boundary-conditions"
  ],
  "title": "Robust supply plan within a specified uncertainty set"
}
```
